comment: Smoke-slice dataset: the 4 goldens + 15 hand-authored cases. Every case must pass the validator or the build fails. Never eval data.

cases.name: shop / add-cheapest-wireless
cases.goal: Add the cheapest wireless headphones to the cart

cases.name: checkout / fill-and-submit
cases.goal: Fill out and submit the checkout form as Jordan Lee, jordan@example.com, shipping to Canada

cases.name: shop / newsletter-signup
cases.goal: Sign up for the newsletter with the email deals@example.com

cases.name: shop / impossible-goal
cases.goal: Track the status of an existing order

cases.name: login / sign-in
cases.goal: Log in as sam@example.com with password hunter2

cases.name: login / forgot-password
cases.goal: Find the link to reset a forgotten password

cases.name: pricing / team-price
cases.goal: Find the monthly price of the Team plan

cases.name: search / open-charger
cases.goal: Open the search result about the wireless charger

cases.name: docs / install-command
cases.goal: Find the command to install the library

cases.name: docs / api-reference
cases.goal: Go to the API Reference section
